title: Red Hat Bug Fix Advisory: gnome-autoar bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for gnome-autoar is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.
description: gnome-autoar is a GObject based library for handling archives.Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): [RFE] Please add gnome-autoar-devel to RHEL 8 CRB repo (JIRA:RHEL-120192)
affected_products: Red Hat Enterprise Linux for x86_64 10 x86_64
Red Hat CodeReady Linux Builder for x86_64 10 x86_64

fixes.description: [RFE] Please add gnome-autoar-devel to RHEL 8 CRB repo

full_text:
An update for gnome-autoar is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.

gnome-autoar is a GObject based library for handling archives.Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): [RFE] Please add gnome-autoar-devel to RHEL 8 CRB repo (JIRA:RHEL-120192)
